EmailTemplate.name: AN - Screening Pack Invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you for applying with Alliance Nursing!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THANKS FOR APPLYING — WE'D LOVE TO GET TO KNOW YOU A LITTLE BETTER.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
In order to match you with shifts that plays on your skills and experience, we need a few more details from you. Follow the link below and let us know your skills and when would be a good time for us to call you and discuss your application.
OK, LET'S GET STARTED
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
